title: Institutional Founding Anniversary
description: Commemorating the historical inception of the college through civic parades and cultural exhibitions.

title: Inter-Collegiate Athletic Meet
description: The premier seasonal tournament where academic units engage in disciplined athletic competition for the institutional cup.

title: Academic Integration & Assembly
description: A formal welcome and socialization event designed to integrate incoming students into the collegiate community.

title: Faculty & Mentorship Recognition
description: A day of honoring the pedagogical expertise and commitment of our faculty members to academic excellence.

title: Annual Yuletide Convocation
description: A unified gathering of all academic departments to celebrate community harmony and the seasonal festivities.

title: Civic Stewardship & Campus Maintenance
description: A recurring initiative focused on environmental sustainability and the physical upkeep of the campus grounds.

title: General Academic Orientation
description: A comprehensive introductory session detailing the institutional policies and collegiate standards for the academic year.

title: Student Council Electoral Proceedings
description: The official democratic process for selecting student representatives to lead the Supreme Student Government.
